channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: ‘Saturday Night Live’: Where to Watch the Sketch Comedy Show Online for Free
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome to the latest update from Billboard. This week, we're excited to announce that Saturday Night Live is new with host Michael-actor Colman Domingo and musical guest Anitta.
[Short music transition]
Host: If you're looking to catch the show, it airs live on NBC at 11:30 p.m. ET/8:30 p.m. PT, and you can also livestream it on Peacock Premium Plus. But what if you don't have cable? Don't worry, we've got you covered.
[Short music transition]
Host: One option is to grab a free trial to DirecTV, which gives you access to NBC and other live TV channels. You can sign up now and get a five-day free trial. Alternatively, you can check out Sling TV, which offers NBC in its Sling Blue package, although prices and channel availability may vary depending on your local market.
[Short music transition]
Host: If you're looking for a more dedicated NBC experience, you can subscribe to Peacock, the official NBC streamer. The Peacock Premium Plus plan costs $16.99 per month and gives you access to the NBC channel. Although there's no free trial, you can sign up for a Walmart+ 30-day free trial to catch the show for free.
[Short music transition]
Host: Other options include Hulu + Live TV, which starts at $89.99 per month and gives you access to hundreds of live TV channels, including NBC, as well as the entire Hulu, Disney+, and ESPN Unlimited libraries.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's it for now. Catch Colman Domingo and Anitta on Saturday Night Live this week, and don't forget to check out our website for more updates and streaming options. Thanks for tuning in.
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
